---
title: "Primer design report"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    df_print: paged
params:
  gene: "gene"
  genus: "genus"
  primers_tsv: ""
  amplicons_tsv: ""
  diversity_png: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(knitr)

gene  <- params$gene
genus <- params$genus

primers   <- read.delim(params$primers_tsv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
amplicons <- read.delim(params$amplicons_tsv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

has_primers   <- nrow(primers) > 0
has_amplicons <- nrow(amplicons) > 0
```

# `r genus` — *`r gene`* primer design

Generated `r format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")`

---

## In silico PCR validation

```{r pcr_summary, results='asis'}
if (!has_amplicons) {
  cat("> **No primer pair was validated.** ",
      "Either no primers passed the design filters, or the top pair ",
      "amplified no genomes. See the candidate table below.\n")
} else {
  a <- amplicons[1, ]
  cat(sprintf(
    paste0(
      "The top-ranked primer pair (**%s**) was tested against all downloaded ",
      "*%s* genomes using `seqkit amplicon`:\n\n",
      "| Metric | Value |\n|---|---|\n",
      "| Forward primer | `%s` |\n",
      "| Reverse primer | `%s` |\n",
      "| Genomes amplified | %s / %s |\n",
      "| Amplification rate | %.1f%% |\n",
      "| Mean amplicon length | %.0f bp |\n"
    ),
    a$primer_id, genus,
    a$fwd, a$rev,
    a$n_genomes_amplified, a$total_genomes,
    a$amplification_rate * 100,
    a$mean_amplicon_len
  ))
}
```

---

## Recommended primer pair

```{r top_primer, results='asis'}
if (!has_primers) {
  cat("> No candidate primers were found. ",
      "Try raising `div_cut` or relaxing `GC_tol` in `config.yaml`.\n")
} else {
  t <- primers[1, ]
  cat(sprintf(
    paste0(
      "| Property | Forward | Reverse |\n|---|---|---|\n",
      "| Sequence | `%s` | `%s` |\n",
      "| Position | %s | %s |\n",
      "| GC fraction | %.2f | %.2f |\n\n",
      "**Amplicon length:** %s bp  \n",
      "**Pair diversity (Shannon):** %.3f  \n",
      "**GC difference:** %.3f  \n",
      "**Combined score:** %.3f\n"
    ),
    t$fwd, t$rev,
    t$fwd_pos, t$rev_pos,
    t$fwd_GC, t$rev_GC,
    t$amplicon_len,
    t$pair_diversity,
    t$delta_GC,
    t$combined_score
  ))
}
```

---

## Sequence diversity

The plot shows per-position Shannon entropy across the alignment. Low-entropy
(conserved) regions are good primer targets. Red rectangles mark the binding
sites of the top-scoring primer pairs.

```{r diversity_plot, results='asis'}
if (file.exists(params$diversity_png)) {
  cat(sprintf("![Diversity plot for %s](%s)\n", gene, params$diversity_png))
} else {
  cat("> Diversity plot not available.\n")
}
```

---

## All candidate primer pairs

```{r all_primers}
if (has_primers) {
  primers
} else {
  cat("No candidates to display.")
}
```
